title: seriphidium glanduligerum
intro: Seriphidium glanduligerum, also known as Mongolian wormwood, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. Seriphidium glanduligerum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
